exercises.name: Back squat
exercises.notes: OPENER: 275 lbs. Warm up: Bar x 10, 135 x 5, 185 x 3, 225 x 1, 255 x 1. Should feel smooth.

exercises.name: Back squat
exercises.notes: SECOND ATTEMPT: 305 lbs. Rest 5-7 min after opener.

exercises.name: Back squat
exercises.notes: THIRD ATTEMPT (PR): 315 lbs. Rest 5-7 min. Three plates. Go get it.

exercises.name: Barbell bench press
exercises.notes: OPENER: 205 lbs. Warm up: Bar x 10, 95 x 5, 135 x 3, 165 x 1, 185 x 1. Should feel smooth.

exercises.name: Barbell bench press
exercises.notes: SECOND ATTEMPT: 215 lbs. Rest 5-7 min.

exercises.name: Barbell bench press
exercises.notes: THIRD ATTEMPT (PR): 225 lbs. Rest 5-7 min. Two plates.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: OPENER: 375 lbs. Warm up: 135 x 5, 225 x 3, 275 x 1, 335 x 1. Should feel smooth.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: SECOND ATTEMPT: 390 lbs. Rest 5-7 min.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.notes: THIRD ATTEMPT (PR): 405 lbs. Rest 5-7 min. Four plates. Leave it all on the platform.
